name: EK Live Cam
summary: Stream the camera of Rokid Glasses in real time.
description: EK LiveCam allows you to view the camera screen of Rokid Glasses in real time using only a web browser on a device (PC, smartphone, tablet, etc.) on the same Wi-Fi network, without complex settings. Key Features - Real-time Streaming: Supports video transmission with minimal delay using the MJPEG (Motion JPEG) method. - High-Definition Optimization: Optimized for 1280x720 (720p) resolution to provide clear image quality. - Easy Access: Connect by simply entering the URL in a web browser (Chrome, Safari, etc.) without installing a separate viewer app. - Status Display: Displays the current streaming status, number of connected users, and streaming URL in real time on the screen. - Hardware Integration: Streaming can be started/stopped not only by touching the screen but also by using the 'Enter' key on the remote control or Rokid Glasses.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
EK LiveCam allows you to view the camera screen of Rokid Glasses in real time using only a web browser on a device (PC, smartphone, tablet, etc.) on the same Wi-Fi network, without complex settings.

**Key Features**
- **Real-time Streaming:** Supports video transmission with minimal delay using the MJPEG (Motion JPEG) method.
- **High-Definition Optimization:** Optimized for 1280x720 (720p) resolution to provide clear image quality.
- **Easy Access:** Connect by simply entering the URL in a web browser (Chrome, Safari, etc.) without installing a separate viewer app.
- **Status Display:** Displays the current streaming status, number of connected users, and streaming URL in real time on the screen.
- **Hardware Integration:** Streaming can be started/stopped not only by touching the screen but also by using the 'Enter' key on the remote control or Rokid Glasses.

### Usage / Controls

- **1. App Launch:** When you open the app, a camera preview screen appears and the Standby status is displayed at the bottom.
- **2. Start Streaming:**
- Touch anywhere on the screen or press the Enter (Confirm) key on the connected controller.
- The status will change to Streaming and a red LIVE badge will appear.
- **3. View Video (Viewer):**
- Check the URL displayed at the bottom center of the app screen (e.g., http://192.168.x.x:8080).
- Enter the URL in the address bar of a web browser on another device and connect.
